"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7444482186822044734","book_info":{"abstract":"【提前穿越+权谋+王朝争霸+魅魔+诸天融合】
本书又叫【我，女帝未婚夫，幕后最强反派】
一觉醒来，夏辰提前登录前世神秘游戏，开局成为镇东侯府嫡子。
 什么？
我还有个亲弟弟，名叫夏昊，疑似体内有一块神秘的骨头？
像极了传说中的至尊骨！
而我天生重瞳！
我这拿的是谁的剧本 ？
        ……
    更让他惊奇的还在后面，自己竟成为了【大一统】版本中最大boss【女帝】的未婚夫，这是要开局成为皇夫吃软饭的节奏吗？
        而这时，游戏版本还在文帝时期 ，所有游戏玩家还未登陆这方世界，女帝还是皇女 ，还未在夺门之变中取得胜利 ……
        想到后面还有【灵气复苏】【诸天融合】【仙朝争霸】版本，夏辰默默站起身来，决定要提前布局，他……要篡位！
……
……
多年后！
玩家开始纷纷降临这方世界！
“陛下，最近域外邪魔降临，为夫感觉你把握不住 ，这里面的水很深 ，为夫不怕，因为，朕……也是域外邪魔！”
夏辰带着兵，走进金銮殿，看着那如同高坐九重天之上不可冒犯的女帝，脸上带着微笑，缓缓说道！
这一日，满城尽带黄金甲！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d446023a2b52e5faf9c9aee4c9d20d69","author":"潇楚还没睡","author_id":"","book_id":"7444482186822044734","book_name":"游戏入侵：我称帝了玩家才穿越","book_short_name":"帝路征途","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"58.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7444482541920207422","read_count":"587892","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2722219"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1281","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,诸天万界,灵气复苏","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/79b97ba81b6c34f2f9eeda16d0a3b4e4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181717&x-signature=qn0q%2BT2binhaDImYPKPutnpTgYg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3778359629976103","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"119"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201708373E19F6649AC0893376BB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":51,"forwarded_count":0
